evidenceItems.quoteOrDescription: Dashboard navigation lists Dashboard, Customers, Follow-up Records, Assignment Rules, Reports, and Permission Settings.
Dashboard widgets include overdue follow-ups, customers without owner, segment distribution, and completion rate.
Customer list columns include Customer ID, Customer Name, Segment, Owner, follow-up dates, Status, and Risk Level.
Customer list actions include view detail, assign owner, export selected, and mark inactive.
Customer detail sections include basic information, contact preferences, owner assignment, timeline, notes, and risk flags.
Customer detail notes say segment edit and inactive approval behavior are unclear.
Follow-up statuses include draft, submitted, manager_reviewed, closed, and reopened.
Follow-up actions include create follow-up, submit follow-up, manager review, reopen, and export records.
Assignment rules mention Segment A senior owner, unassigned manager queue, overdue reassignment, and VIP manager visibility.
Permission settings list System Admin, Sales Director, Sales Manager, Sales Rep, and Viewer roles.
Permission settings explicitly mark export permission, cross-team visibility, and inactive marking authority as unclear.
customers.csv headers define customer_id, customer_name, segment, owner_rep_id, status, risk_level, last_follow_up_date, and next_follow_up_due.
customers.csv contains a customer with empty owner_rep_id, showing owner can be missing in mock data.
follow_up_records.csv headers define record_id, customer_id, rep_id, follow_up_type, status, created_at, submitted_at, reviewed_by, and next_action_due.
sales_reps.csv headers define rep_id, rep_name, team, role, and status.
customer_segments.csv headers define segment, description, priority, default_follow_up_days, and manager_visibility_required.
Business notes say export may have been director-only, but some managers also exported.
Business notes say inactive marking may require manager confirmation, but this is unclear.
Role notes describe all-customer director scope, team manager scope, assigned customer rep scope, and reports-only viewer scope.
Role notes list reassignment approval and rep self-reassignment as unclear permissions.
Workflow notes define new customer, assigned, follow-up draft, submitted, manager reviewed, closed, and reopened.
Workflow notes say it is unclear whether reopened returns to draft.
Workflow notes say overdue automatic reminder behavior is unclear.

claimMappings.claim: The system contains a Customer Management module.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Customer list, customer detail, and customer CSV materials directly identify customer management behavior.

claimMappings.claim: The system contains a Follow-up Records module.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Follow-up records screen and CSV headers support a dedicated follow-up record area.

claimMappings.claim: The system contains an Assignment Rules module.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Assignment rule screen lists rules, actions, and open reassignment questions.

claimMappings.claim: The system contains a Permission Settings module.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Permission settings screen names roles and unclear permission boundaries.
Customer list columns and CSV headers directly define customer data.
Follow-up records UI and CSV headers define the entity and states.

claimMappings.claim: CustomerSegment is a core configuration entity.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Segment CSV and assignment rules both use segment as a control dimension.

claimMappings.claim: Follow-up record status uses draft, submitted, manager_reviewed, closed, and reopened values.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: UI and workflow notes agree on status labels, but reopened transition remains unclear.

claimMappings.claim: Sales Managers can view team customers, but cross-team visibility is unclear.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Role notes and permission screen support team scope but do not settle cross-team access.

claimMappings.claim: Sales Director likely can export records, but export by role is unresolved.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Export action is visible and notes mention director export, but manager export behavior is unclear.

claimMappings.claim: Customer follow-up follows new customer, assigned, draft, submitted, manager reviewed, closed, and reopened states.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: UI and notes provide the lifecycle but not all transition rules.

claimMappings.claim: Unassigned and overdue customers can enter assignment or reassignment review.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Assignment rules and empty owner data support a queue/reassignment workflow, but approval is unclear.

claimMappings.claim: Which roles can export customer and follow-up records?
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Export is visible but role authority is contradictory or incomplete.

claimMappings.claim: Can Sales Managers view customers outside their team?
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Manager team scope is stated, but cross-team access is not settled.

claimMappings.claim: What happens when a closed follow-up is reopened?
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Reopened exists as a status, but the return state is unclear.
Fixture names use mock customer and mock rep identifiers only.
